perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, bangs, and a red camisole is lying on a bed in a bright room, resting her chin on her right hand and looking into the camera. (2) As she begins to speak, her facial expression changes from neutral to expressive, making hand gestures with her left hand to emphasize her words. (3) She continues talking with a playful smile, eventually pointing her finger towards the lens before the screen cuts to black.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice begins speaking in Mandarin over a light, upbeat electronic background track. (2) Cartoon-style sound effects (like a 'whoosh' or 'pop') coincide with the appearance of text on screen. (3) The vocal performance remains fast-paced and humorous until the audio cuts out at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '幹': Hook text, expressing a slang-style exclamation with a bold, emphatic tone. (2) '我昨天把我男友給踹了': Functional text, narrating 'I dumped my boyfriend yesterday.' (3) '他問我到底愛不愛他': Functional text, narrating 'He asked if I really love him or not.' (4) '都沒到底 是要我怎樣愛啊': Functional/Pun text, playing on the word '到底' (to the bottom/really), with a sarcastic and humorous tone. (5) '愛三小': Hook text, using slang for 'Love what?' with a defiant tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The creator tells a short, humorous story/joke directly to the camera from a fixed lying-down position.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible in a close-up/medium shot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, heavy eye makeup, wearing a red low-cut top and a silver necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic bedroom environment featuring a white bed, a wooden wardrobe/cabinet with a mirror, and an air conditioning unit on the wall.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a short-form comedy skit designed for entertainment and social engagement. The creator uses a pun involving the phrase '到底' (which can mean 'really' or 'to the bottom' in a sexual/physical context) to create a humorous and slightly provocative story about a breakup.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Direct eye contact, lying down POV, use of localized slang.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets a young audience familiar with internet slang and short-form storytelling common on platforms like TikTok or Reels.
